title: Churn Predictor
description: Built a churn prediction model for the banking sector using machine learning techniques. Trained and evaluated the model on a dataset of 1 lakh+ customer records stored in MySQL.
features: Model tuning with age, salary, and credit score
Excel dashboards for churn trends and customer segments

title: Weather Forecasting
description: Interactive Streamlit application for region-wise 24-hour weather forecasting. Applied Multilinear Regression, Random Forest (R² = 0.99), and LSTM models to capture temporal dependencies.

title: Student Management System
description: Developed a comprehensive CLI-based student management system to handle student records and administration interactively. Utilized Maven as a DevOps tool for build automation and dependency management.
